name: io.github.neuroverseos/bevia
title: Bevia
description: Query your Bevia map over MCP — territories, moments, and briefings from your human+AI work.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <token> — generate a token at https://bevia.co/access-keys. OAuth-capable clients (e.g. browser-based ones) can leave this unset; the endpoint advertises OAuth via standard discovery.

environmentVariables.name: BEVIA_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bevia API token — generate at https://bevia.co/access-keys. Shown once at creation; treat it like an API key.
